content.en:
......

"Changfeng Dao Ancestor is afraid that he suspects that there are more Daokong True Trees on my body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he didn't regret taking out the Daokong True Tree, after all, in that case, if he didn't take out the Daokong True Tree, it would be impossible for the Changfeng Dao Ancestor to take out the Zhenyu Stone to trade with him.

Now that the Zhenyu Stone is in hand, even if Changfeng Dao Ancestor has the intention of attacking him, it doesn't matter.

He is not afraid of anything!

"My current strength is not the opponent of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor, and the Xubai Dao Ancestor is not the opponent of the Changfeng Dao Ancestor. It's better to stay here in Julu City first, and then use the Town Stone to condense the Dao Heart, and if the Dao Heart is successfully condensed, you can go to the Sixfold Dao Ancestor Realm!" Ye Tian muttered.

So, he rented a dojo here, and began to practice in retreat here to condense his Dao heart.

The heart of the Dao is centered on the things that are carried, and it is integrated into a kind of extreme path.

If it was the other half-step sixfold ancestors, there was a high probability that the condensation Dao heart would fail, and the failure rate of the condensation Dao fruit would be even higher.

However, Ye Tian himself had a fifty percent chance of succeeding in attacking the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and condensing the Dao Heart was very simple for him, and it was unlikely that he would fail.

However, Ye Tian still continued to understand the experience of the other half-step sixfold ancestors in condensing the Dao Heart, and after a thorough understanding, he began to condense the Dao Heart.

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian took out the Zhenyu Stone, integrated it into his body, and then urged the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes to merge into the Zhenyu Stone, thus casting the Dao Heart.

The process is slow and takes a long time to succeed.

Time passed slowly, and after a period of time, Xubai Dao Ancestor sent a message and said that he was leaving.

At this time, it is naturally impossible for Ye Tian to leave!

"Void White Dao Ancestor, you leave first, I'm condensing Dao Heart!"

Ye Tian said.

Seeing this, the Void White Dao Ancestor could only leave first, and then come to pick up Ye Tian later.

After all, it has been a long time since he condensed his Dao heart, and he still has to go back to the primeval realm to have something!

In the blink of an eye, the years of the 100,000 Origin Era passed.

Ye Tian didn't know how much power he had integrated into the Extreme Dao, and after dividing it for such a long time, he was finally about to completely condense his Dao heart.

And the Zhenyu Stone had long since disappeared, turning into a Dao Heart formed by the fusion of the Infinite Extreme Dao power.

Although the Dao Heart is illusory, it is the foundation of the Dao Fruit.

If you can't condense the Dao mind, you won't be able to achieve the Dao fruit.

this day.

The Dao Heart was successfully condensed, and Ye Tian's body began to undergo a slight transformation, and there was even a sixfold ancestral aura on his body.

At this moment, he was really only one step away from the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

"The next step is to impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian was not ready to break through in Julu City, it was not suitable to break through here, because the primordial black sea of the Shattered Void Realm had long been shattered, forming countless fragments, the energy was not pure, and the extreme path was chaotic.

Therefore, he was still preparing to make a breakthrough in the primordial black sea at the boundary of the primeval plain region.

Once the breakthrough was successful, he would change the replica body in Julu City and copy the replica body of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

When the time comes, he will leave Julu City with the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, if the Changfeng Dao Ancestor attacks him, he will really find death.

Perhaps, he will be able to obtain the full net worth of a sixfold ancestor again.

......

Archean Plains boundary.

Ye Tian arranged a magic circle, and in the Primordial Black Sea area near the Origin Boundary Sea, it gathered a huge amount of Primordial Black Sea energy and turned into a continent.

Then Ye Tian began to break through the realm of the Sixfold Ancestor in this continent.

"With a fifty percent chance, I won't waste the light of Taixuan and Zixuan, and I will directly impact, if the breakthrough fails, then reproduce the body again and impact again. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Soon, the onslaught began!

Ye Tian absorbed endless energy, integrated it into the Dao Heart, and began to condense the Dao Fruit.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, tens of thousands of primordial eras had passed.

At this time, Ye Tian found that the critical moment was coming, and if it was done, the Dao Fruit would be condensed.

If it fails, the Dao Fruit Condensation fails, and this body will also be severely damaged.

Airplanes!!!

Dao Fruit began to form, and countless Extreme Dao powers began to be absorbed by Dao Fruit.

And the Dao Fruit was conceived from within the Dao Heart, absorbing the power of the Dao Heart, and gradually, the Dao Heart began to wither and dissipate, and all the energy turned into a part of the Dao Fruit.

And the countless energies of the outside world were also integrated into Ye Tian's body, and even this continent that was transformed from the energy of the primordial Black Sea was absorbed into Ye Tian's body.

Immediately, Ye Tian also prepared a lot of resources to absorb and refine them one by one.

Abrupt.

A small Dao fruit was born.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Although the Dao Fruit has not yet been completely stabilized, and it is still very small, it already means that Ye Tian has succeeded, and the next step is the process of absorbing energy and slowly growing the Dao Fruit, and there will be no accidents.

"This time is good, the first time it was a success!"

Ye Tian continued to work hard to cultivate, absorb energy, and strengthen his Dao Fruit.

This step took him tens of thousands of years of the Origin Domain Era, and only then did he succeed in condensing the complete Dao Fruit.

And then, Ye Tian's body began to transform, transforming from a half-step sixfold primordial ancestor to a sixfold primordial ancestor, and his strength skyrocketed at an incredible speed!

Almost every time he breathed, his strength skyrocketed.

After a long time, his strength had far surpassed that of the half-step Sixfold Ancestor.

On this day, Ye Tian's cultivation was completely stabilized in the early stage realm of the half-step sixfold ancestor.

"It's broken, it's time to replace the replica body in Julu City with the replica body of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

Giant Deer City.

Ye Tian didn't need to re-impact, he directly copied the copy body of the sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, and then this half-step copy body of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm directly annihilated itself, and the items on his body were also put away by the copy body of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

In this way, he silently became the Sixfold Ancestor, and the Changfeng Dao Ancestor was afraid that after knowing about it, he would be dumbfounded!

Subsequently, Ye Tian restrained his breath and concealed his sixfold ancestor realm as much as possible.

"It's time to go back, if Changfeng Dao Ancestor dares to attack me, he will die!"

Ye Tian quickly left Julu City.

......

"The Endless Saint Ancestor has finally left Julu City, and there is a Void White Dao Ancestor behind him, and he has already left. Kill him, there is no problem at all. "

Changfeng Dao Ancestor followed as soon as possible, and after preparing to leave the area of Julu City again, he directly killed Ye Tian.

Soon.

They were out of the range of Julu City.

At this time, Changfeng Dao Ancestor directly intercepted Ye Tian, and he was about to make a move!
